'''poyasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yonder|yonder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yonder|yonder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| poyasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyasithi|poyasithi]] || [[word:poyasiji|poyasiji]] || [[word:poyasishi|poyasishi]] || [[word:poyasiki|poyasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyasuthuthu|poyasuthuthu]] || [[word:poyasujuju|poyasujuju]] || [[word:poyasushushu|poyasushushu]] || [[word:poyasukuku|poyasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyasuthu|poyasuthu]] || [[word:poyasuju|poyasuju]] || [[word:poyasushu|poyasushu]] || [[word:poyasuku|poyasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyasufthuf|poyasufthuf]] || [[word:poyasufjuf|poyasufjuf]] || [[word:poyasufshuf|poyasufshuf]] || [[word:poyasufkuf|poyasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyasethe|poyasethe]] || [[word:poyaseje|poyaseje]] || [[word:poyaseshe|poyaseshe]] || [[word:poyaseke|poyaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyasothotho|poyasothotho]] || [[word:poyasojojo|poyasojojo]] || [[word:poyasoshosho|poyasoshosho]] || [[word:poyasokoko|poyasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyasotho|poyasotho]] || [[word:poyasojo|poyasojo]] || [[word:poyasosho|poyasosho]] || [[word:poyasoko|poyasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyasofthof|poyasofthof]] || [[word:poyasofjof|poyasofjof]] || [[word:poyasofshof|poyasofshof]] || [[word:poyasofkof|poyasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfthÃŸf|poyasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfjÃŸf|poyasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfshÃŸf|poyasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfkÃŸf|poyasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|poyasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|poyasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|poyasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|poyasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfthÃŸf|poyasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfjÃŸf|poyasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfshÃŸf|poyasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfkÃŸf|poyasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfthÃŸf|poyasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfjÃŸf|poyasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfshÃŸf|poyasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:poyasÃŸfkÃŸf|poyasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyasÃḊthÃḊ|poyasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:poyasÃḊjÃḊ|poyasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:poyasÃḊshÃḊ|poyasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:poyasÃḊkÃḊ|poyasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyasathatha|poyasathatha]] || [[word:poyasajaja|poyasajaja]] || [[word:poyasashasha|poyasashasha]] || [[word:poyasakaka|poyasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyasatha|poyasatha]] || [[word:poyasaja|poyasaja]] || [[word:poyasasha|poyasasha]] || [[word:poyasaka|poyasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyasafthaf|poyasafthaf]] || [[word:poyasafjaf|poyasafjaf]] || [[word:poyasafshaf|poyasafshaf]] || [[word:poyasafkaf|poyasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:poyasasha|poyasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyashÃḋsha|poyashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyasrosha|poyasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyasmusha|poyasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyasyasha|poyasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyasnkshÃḋsha|gopoyasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyasnkrosha|gopoyasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyasnkmusha|gopoyasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyasnkyasha|gopoyasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:poyayasasha|poyayasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyayashÃḋsha|poyayashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyayasrosha|poyayasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyayasmusha|poyayasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyayasyasha|poyayasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyayasnkshÃḋsha|gopoyayasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyayasnkrosha|gopoyayasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyayasnkmusha|gopoyayasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyayasnkyasha|gopoyayasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:peyÃḊsasha|peyÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:peyÃḊshÃḋsha|peyÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:peyÃḊsrosha|peyÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:peyÃḊsmusha|peyÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:peyÃḊsyasha|peyÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gopeyÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊsnkrosha|gopeyÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊsnkmusha|gopeyÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopeyÃḊsnkyasha|gopeyÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:poyfasasha|poyfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyfashÃḋsha|poyfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyfasrosha|poyfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyfasmusha|poyfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyfasyasha|poyfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyfasnkshÃḋsha|gopoyfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyfasnkrosha|gopoyfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyfasnkmusha|gopoyfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyfasnkyasha|gopoyfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
